candidates.why: This is the only explicit COGS-related D&A row above operating profit. However, it appears directly under the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' alongside other apparent components/sub-lines ('Labor & Related Expense - COGS', balancing rows), so it looks embedded within the selected COGS bucket rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

variables.notes: No separate COGS D&A should be added. The visible COGS D&A row appears to be a component of the already selected 'Cost of goods sold' total, so adding it would risk double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/Amortization in Sales and marketing costs
candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A row tied to the selected 'Sales and Marketing Costs' bucket, but it appears as a sub-component directly beneath that selected parent row, so it is likely already embedded in the selected amount and should not be added separately.

This is an explicit D&A row tied to SG&A, but it appears directly under the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses' with other apparent components/sub-lines, indicating it is likely already included in the selected administrative expense bucket rather than separate.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A D&A should be added. The visible D&A rows for sales/marketing and SGA look like components nested under already selected SG&A buckets. No explicit separate 'Amortization in R&D' row is present, and the selected R&D row is already handled symmetrically in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
